compiled_state.title: Split oversized test files along seams (reducer done; graph + bash suites remain)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
The large test files (>1000 lines) are split along natural seams, extracting shared fixtures/helpers to avoid duplication.

Done: tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py (3647 LOC, 65 tests) -> tests/scripts/reducer/ (7 seam files + conftest.py [reducer fixture] + _events.py [_write_event/_UUID*]). Count-neutral (scripts tier still 383), all 65 green, 0 isolation-guard hits.

Remaining: tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py (2792) -> graph fixture + _isolate_git autouse + _write_ticket/_write_blocks_link/etc. into tests/scripts/graph/conftest.py + helper module, split into ~6 seam files. Bash suites (test-ticket-lib/transition/link/create/list.sh) -> factor inline helpers into tests/lib/ticket-suite-helpers.sh, split flat (collector globs test-*.sh); but weigh against the adult-oxide-slave strangler-fig migration which replaces them with pytest.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [x] reducer split: shared fixture+helper extracted, 7 seam files, count-neutral, green
- [ ] graph split: shared graph fixture + autouse git-isolation + write helpers extracted, ~6 seam files, count-neutral, green
- [ ] bash-suite split decision recorded (split now vs defer to strangler-fig)

comments.body: Graph split landed (this commit): test_ticket_graph.py (2792 LOC, 59 fns/65 cases) -> tests/scripts/graph/ (7 seam files + conftest [graph fixture + autouse git-isolation] + _helpers [write helpers + loader]). Count-neutral (scripts tier 383), all 65 green, 0 guard hits. Both Python monoliths now done; only the bash-suite split decision remains (recommend folding into adult-oxide-slave).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Bash-suite split DECISION (final AC item): DEFER the flat split of test-ticket-lib/transition/link/create/list.sh — do NOT split them now. Rationale: the adult-oxide-slave bash->Python strangler-fig migration replaces these bash suites with pytest wholesale; splitting them first would be throwaway churn (carving bash we plan to delete, against the module-size policy's 'prefer deleting oversized bash over carving it'). The two Python monoliths (reducer 3647 LOC, graph 2792 LOC) are already split along seams, count-neutral and green. Bash split folded into the strangler-fig epic. All AC items resolved.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
